## Appointments

::: {.appointments}

::: {.appointment}
<div class="appointment-year">
2024–Present
</div>

<div class="appointment-details">

**Assistant Professor**  
Department of Human Development and Family Studies  
Penn State University

**Affiliations**
- Social Science Research Institute (SSRI)
- Geroscience Consortium, Center for Healthy Aging

</div>
:::

::: {.appointment}
<div class="appointment-year">
2020–2023
</div>

<div class="appointment-details">

**Assistant Professor**  
Department of Psychology  
Human Factors and Cognitive Psychology Program  
University of Central Florida

</div>
:::

:::

<style>

.appointments {
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.appointment {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 130px 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  align-items: start;
}

.appointment-year {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #444;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.appointment-details p {
  margin: 0;
}

.appointment-details ul {
  margin-top: .3rem;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

</style>
